sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24628" key="dia/gluptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-γλυπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n24628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divided,</tr_> of a quill-pen, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.227</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
